title: helictotrichon pratense subsp. lusitanicum
intro: Helictotrichon pratense subsp. lusitanicum, also known as Lusitanian false brome, is a plant species belonging to the grass family and is commonly found in the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been found to be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Helictotrichon pratense subsp. lusitanicum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or oil form to harness its medicinal properties.
